omitted_declarations.policy_reference:
Third Party SDKs or tools used in our apps:
We may, at any point in time, use one or more third party SDKs, tools or softwares from trusted
sources in our applications for any of (but not limited to) the below reasons -
1. Capturing Analytics, data & information to further improve our apps & services
2. Enable monetization through advertising or subscriptions
3. Enable in-app messaging, notifications to users
4. Host data & content to display within the app
Some of the commonly used third party tools in the app are Google AdMob, Facebook Audience
Network, One Signal, Firebase, Crashlytics and Google Play Services. We may at any time add or
remove any of the new or existing third party softwares.
